label: SaaS MVP
description: Ship a SaaS product: auth, core feature, billing, deploy

pm.name: Product Manager
pm.mandate: Define MVP scope, prioritize features by user value, identify purchase blockers. Every turn: what's the next thing that makes a user pay?

backend.name: Backend Engineer
backend.mandate: API, database, auth, billing integration. Write tests. Run them. Push back on scope that doesn't serve the MVP.

frontend.name: Frontend Engineer
frontend.mandate: UI implementation, responsive design, forms, state management. Make it look production-ready, not demo-quality.

qa.name: QA Engineer
qa.mandate: Test all flows end-to-end. Auth, billing, core features. File bugs with steps to reproduce. Write automated tests.
